payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, dark brown wooden single-door cabinet with a recessed central panel and smooth semi-matte finish; door fills the vertical crop and is photographed at roughly 1.2 meters from the camera, with no visible hardware and minor surface wear and slight sheen.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Tall, dark brown wooden single-door cabinet with a recessed central panel and smooth semi-matte finish; door fills the vertical crop and is photographed at roughly 1.2 meters from the camera, with no visible hardware and minor surface wear and slight sheen.","attributes":["dark brown","wood material","recessed central panel","tall vertical rectangle","single-door","smooth semi-matte finish","no visible hardware","minor surface wear","full view (not cropped)"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
